Inc.","details":"This contract provides a simple Schelling game for pausing and updating a Tellor Layer Light Client Bridge contract in the event that Tellor Layer chain is attacked. Any user can pay a high fee to begin the Schelling game. Then either the bridge is immediately paused or an optional  second signature is required from a configured guardian address. The initiator has a period of time to propose a new implementation address. Then anyone can pay to support or oppose the proposal. Once the voting period expires, the bridge is unpaused, and if the proposal is supported by a majority of the tokens, the bridge  implementation address is updated. The winning side gets their tokens refunded and splits the losing side's tokens.","kind":"dev","methods":{"claim(uint256)":{"details":"Claim tokens after proposal has been executed","params":{"_proposalId":"ID of proposal to claim tokens from"}},"constructor":{"details":"Initializes system parameters","params":{"_bridgeProxy":"address of bridge proxy contract","_extensionPeriod":"total voting period, reset when outcome changes","_guardian":"optional guardian to sign proposal to pause bridge","_minInitAmount":"minimum amount of tokens required to initiate Schelling game. 10% is burned","_requireGuardianSignature":"whether or not guardian signature is required to pause bridge","_submissionPeriod":"maximum period after pausing bridge to submit implementation"}},"executeProposal(uint256)":{"details":"Execute proposal after voting period has expired or after submission period has expired if guardian required but never signed","params":{"_proposalId":"ID of proposal to execute"}},"getProposal(uint256)":{"details":"Get proposal details","params":{"_proposalId":"ID of proposal"},"returns":{"_0":"initiator address of user who initiated Schelling game","_1":"proposedImplementation address of proposed bridge implementation","_2":"amountFor amount of tokens in support of proposal","_3":"amountAgainst amount of tokens against proposal","_4":"submissionDeadline deadline for submitting implementation address","_5":"expirationTime deadline for voting, extended when outcome changes","_6":"executed whether or not proposal has been executed","_7":"guardianSigned whether or not guardian has signed proposal","_8":"outcome final outcome of proposal"}},"getVotes(uint256,address)":{"details":"Get vote details","params":{"_proposalId":"ID of proposal","_voter":"address of voter"},"returns":{"_0":"amountFor amount of tokens in support of proposal","_1":"amountAgainst amount of tokens against proposal"}},"guardianPauseBridge(uint256)":{"details":"Guardian can sign proposal and pause bridge, only if required","params":{"_proposalId":"ID of proposal"}},"initiateProposal()":{"details":"Initiates Schelling game by paying minimum amount of tokens"},"submitImplementation(uint256,address)":{"details":"Propose new implementation address after Schelling game initiated","params":{"_proposalId":"ID of proposal","_proposedImplementation":"address of proposed implementation"}},"throwAwayGuardianship()":{"details":"Guardian can remove requirement for signature to pause bridge"},"transferGuardianship(address)":{"details":"Transfer guardianship to new address","params":{"_newGuardian":"address of new guardian"}},"updateVote(uint256,bool)":{"details":"Allows a voter to change their vote before expiration","params":{"_for":"whether or not to vote in support of proposal","_proposalId":"ID of proposal"}},"vote(uint256,bool)":{"details":"Vote in support of or against proposal","params":{"_for":"whether or not to vote in support of proposal","_proposalId":"ID of proposal"}}},"title":"SimpleSchelling","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"initiateProposal()":{"notice":"10% of amount is burned"},"updateVote(uint256,bool)":{"notice":"Initiator cannot update vote, and 10% of amount is
